jobs.title: Architectural Floor Plan Drafting
jobs.description:
I need detailed architectural floor plans produced in Autodesk software. You will be turning my sketches and notes into clean, accurate drawings that can be issued to consultants and expanded later into full construction documentation.

The drawings must be created entirely in AutoCAD or Revit, drawn to real-world scale, and organised on sensible layers so elevations and sections could be added in the future. Please include walls, doors, windows, fixtures, room names and clear overall and partial dimensions.

Deliverables  
• Dimensioned floor plan in the native Autodesk file format (.dwg or .

jobs.description:
I need a clean, trademark-ready wordmark for the brand name “Zayvik” in a distinctly classic style. The logo must rely on strong typography only—no spice illustrations or ornamental patterns—yet still feel warm and appetising by using a red-to-yellow palette. Once the core mark is approved, I want to carry that same look across five spice packs: chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, and garam masala.

jobs.title: Spanish Interpreter for Plant Visits
jobs.description:
I need an experienced Spanish-to-English interpreter to accompany me during upcoming plant visits in Latin America. The purpose of every conversation is partnership building, so nuance, cultural awareness, and absolute accuracy are critical.

During the visits you will provide real-time consecutive or whispered interpretation while we walk the shop floor, sit down with managers, and review documents. Discussions will routinely touch on:

• Manufacturing processes  
• Equipment maintenance  
• Regulatory compliance
